prompt: Edit image 1: Using its inherent depth information from the computer graphics render, apply a strong, shallow depth of field blur like that in image 2. Adopt the dark, moody lighting and blue tones from image 2. Finally, apply a subtle sepia filter over the result, similar to the tone in image 3, enhancing the depth-driven composition.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the computer graphics render of chess pieces, by applying a strong, shallow depth of field blur. Sharply focus on the front-most chess pieces, such as the rook and knight on the left, while progressively blurring the mid-ground and background chess pieces and board, emulating the pronounced foreground focus and background blur seen in image 2. Re-light the scene to adopt the dark, moody ambiance and distinct blue color palette characteristic of image 2. Finally, apply a subtle sepia tone across the entire image, reminiscent of the warm, muted hues in image 3, ensuring this effect complements and enhances the newly established depth-driven composition.
objects: Sharply focused rook on the left
Sharply focused knight on the left
